markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client updates, proposals, and technical issues for HX and Auto.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**HX PSEO Proposal:** A text-based wireframe is due this week to help client David visualize the PSEO project's structure, as he is struggling to grasp the concept.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**HX Reporting Anomaly:** Investigate HX's reporting, where Looker shows impossible 99–100% engagement rates and a 150k-visitor spike to a "not set" page, likely caused by bots or misconfiguration.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Auto Reporting Integration:** Auto wants to combine GA and Mixpanel data for a full-funnel view. The plan is to get Mixpanel access for supplemental analysis, not a full Looker integration.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [**Schema Markup as a Service:** Adding schema is a service offered via a support ticket. It's a simple code snippet but may require design work (e.g., accordion UI for FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

## Topics

### HX: PSEO Proposal & Reporting Issues

  - [**PSEO Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
      - [**Context:** David is excited about PSEO but struggles to visualize the project's structure, which is blocking progress.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Solution:** Jakub will create a text-based wireframe by tomorrow morning.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
          - [**Purpose:** Provide a clear visual for David and an artifact for the eng team to build the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
          - [**Contents:** Proposed structure, topic list, keywords, and spot-checked search volumes.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Proposal sent this week for review at next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Scope:** \~50 pages per line of business. Bailey to confirm the weekly content cadence with Andy, as it may differ from the standard 5-piece editorial cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Reporting Anomaly:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Issue:** HX's Looker reports show impossible data, making performance tracking unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Specifics:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
          - [99–100% engagement rates on key pages (homepage, pricing, blog).](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
          - [A 150k-visitor spike to a "not set" landing page, coinciding with a podcast release.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The spike is likely bot traffic from podcast distribution platforms, not real users.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [**Action:** Jakub will investigate the cause of the inflated engagement rates.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Auto: Reporting & Schema Markup

  - [**Full-Funnel Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [**Goal:** Auto wants a unified view of the user journey from landing page (GA) to sign-up (Mixpanel).](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
          - [Bailey will request Mixpanel access.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
          - [Jakub will use Mixpanel for supplemental analysis, not a full Looker integration.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
          - [The reporting deep dive call will be rescheduled to accommodate Jakub.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [**Schema Markup as a Service:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Question:** Can the team implement schema markup for clients?](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Answer:** Yes, it's a service offered via a support ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Requires adding a code snippet to the blog template. For features like FAQ schema, it may also require design work (e.g., creating an accordion UI).](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

### Logic: Strategy & Keyword Research

  - [**Status:** Logic is reviewing updated artifacts sent Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Revise strategy → conduct new keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [**Support:** Jakub will provide a gut check on the new keyword research, which may be technical.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Create and send the HX PSEO wireframe by tomorrow morning.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Investigate the cause of HX's inflated engagement rates.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Reschedule the Auto reporting deep dive call.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Email HX client David to confirm the PSEO proposal delivery timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [Confirm the PSEO content cadence with Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Request Mixpanel access from Auto.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [Reschedule the Auto reporting deep dive call.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZqXPyzP5qGrK5JRXTxM4WJ-PVW_BD2u?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
